sections.biography-source-undefined: Guo Youzhi was from Nanyang commandery. He was Palace Gentleman before Zhuge Liang made him Palace Attendant. He was described as “harmonious and compliant”. Liao Li criticized him for being “unprepared to manage important matters”.

full_text:
Guo Youzhi (Yanchang) 郭攸之 (演長)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Guo Youzhi (郭攸之), styledYanchang (演長), was born in Nanyang. Loyal and honest but incapable of handling matters on his own. Guo Youzhi was affiliated with the Shu Kingdom.

BiographySource Undefined
Guo Youzhi was from Nanyang commandery. He was Palace Gentleman before Zhuge Liang made him Palace Attendant. He was described as “harmonious and compliant”. Liao Li criticized him for being “unprepared to manage important matters”.
